calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-05-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Larry Becker, Clerk Karissa Shaw, Reporter Jo Ann Bryce. (218)

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff Hans Sellhorn represented by Daniel Piccinini
Defendant Rubin Logan represented by Sheila M. Pierce

Judge Pro Tempore, litigants and counsel met in Room 303A for a UD Settlement Conference.

Settlement reached between parties and put on the record in Department 206. Some of the major points of settlement are as follows;

1) Defendant shall vacate and return possession of the premises at 570 O'Farrell Street #212 to Plaintiffs by September 20th, 2006 on or before 5:00 p.m.

2) Defendant shall have all his property removed from the premises by 5:00 p.m. on September 20th, 2006. If there is any property remaining after the deadline, it will be considered abandoned.

3) All prior agreements between parties are null and void.

4) Defendant waives any claims against Plaintiff Sellhorn and his wife. Defendant shall dismiss his claims against the Plaintiffs filed with HUD and the San Francisco Human Rights Commission.

5) Plaintiffs waive any claims against Defendant.

6) CCP1542 is waived by both parties.

7) Each side to bear its own fees and costs.

8) If Defendant violates the settlement agreement, then Plaintiff shall enter judgment against him.

9) If Defendant honors the settlement agreement, then Plaintiff shall file a dismissal with prejudice of this case within 10 days after September 20th, 2006.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-14-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT RUBIN LOGAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED MAY 23, 2006. =(301/PJB/ju) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
